# Micro32 Tool50 Swarm70 Contract

## Micro 32
micro compaction usage pressure defaults to 0.32 with min content tokens 2 so tool-result clearing starts earlier

## Tool 50
model-facing tool result budgets default to 50 chars with 2-char previews

## Swarm 70
swarm expert body / total / inline densify to 70 / 2k / 14 for thriftier multi-agent handoffs

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + micro/tool/boundary vitest
